q: What do you do if your item is heavy?
examiner_note: Nói về giải pháp thực tế. Sử dụng 'give me a hand', 'trolley', 'smaller loads', 'injure oneself'.

band7.text: I usually ask a friend or someone nearby to give me a hand. If it’s really too heavy, I’ll try to use a trolley or divide it into smaller loads so that I don’t injure myself or strain my back.
band7.note: Sử dụng thành ngữ (give me a hand) và giải thích lý do thực tế.

band8.text: When faced with a heavy load, I tend to be quite cautious. I’ll typically look for assistance or utilize a cart if one is available. It’s far better to take multiple trips or wait for help than to risk a physical injury by overexerting myself.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng hay (cautious, assistance, utilize, overexerting).

band9.text: I prioritize safety and efficiency when dealing with heavy items. I’ll either seek professional help or employ mechanical aids like a dolly or a forklift if necessary. I’m acutely aware of the potential for long-term physical strain, so I never hesitate to delegate the task or use the appropriate equipment.
band9.note: Sử dụng từ vựng ở mức độ cao (efficiency, mechanical aids, acutely aware, delegate).

v.example: Don't overexert yourself during the workout.
She was acutely aware of the danger.
A good manager knows how to delegate tasks.

advanced_vocab.example: If you need any assistance, please don't hesitate to ask.

similar_questions: Have you ever helped someone carry something heavy?
Is it common to see people carrying heavy loads in your city?
